steps.title: Find the highest percentage
steps.content: The student claims all areas need more shaded bus-stop shelters and wants to support that by citing the highest percentage of shaded stops for any area. The phrase "only" signals that even the maximum value should be low.

steps.title: Check the table values
steps.content: A and C do not match the table's shaded-shelter percentages. B gives 15%, which is the lowest percentage, not the highest. The highest percentage shown is still low enough to support the claim that more shaded shelters are needed. The answer is D.
